problem id: 51da116f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  01011111 -> 00011011
  00101011 -> 11010101
  10111000 -> 10010111
  00100010 -> 01100100
  00001010 -> 11100001
  11000111 -> 10001000
  11110000 -> 00011110
  00010110 -> 10100010
  11000110 -> 10111000
  10111111 -> 00000111

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00100000
